title: Gmod Tool Gun
description: Adds The Tool Gun From Garry's Mod
body:
[​This Does Work For Mod Items]
- Type /function tool_gun:give To Get The Tool Gun.

- **To use the tool gun put it in your offhand﻿, and hold any item in your mainhand to copy, when your done with that right click with the tool gun and the item you copied will be on the ground for you to pickup**

Don't Worry I Will Make A Recipe For The Tool Gun If You Want To Get It Without Cheating Soon
I Hope You Injoy This Data Pack It Was Fun And Simple To Make, See You All Next Time :)
